query:
SELECT DISTINCT LOWER(t) AS "tag!"
          FROM (
              SELECT UNNEST(s.tags) AS t
                FROM likes l
                JOIN samples s ON l.target_id = s.id
               WHERE l.usuario_id = $1
                 AND l.tipo = 'sample'
                 AND l.reaccion IN ('like', 'encanta')
               LIMIT $2
          ) sub
         WHERE t IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(t) <> ''
